parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ fileId: $('Webhook').first().json.body.fileId, orgId: $('Webhook').first().json.body.orgId, stage: 'indexed', progress: 100, chunkCount: $json.chunkCount, vectorCount: $json.chunkCount }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ fileId: $('Webhook').first().json.body.fileId, orgId: $('Webhook').first().json.body.orgId, stage: 'failed', progress: 0, errorMessage: ($json.error && $json.error.message) ? String($json.error.message).slice(0, 300) : 'Ingestion failed in n8n' }) }}
